name: Mirror_Mech

infobox.Systems: Janus Cannon(Brute)EffectFire two projectiles in opposite directions.(1 damage)Upgrade I+1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.Upgrade II+1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theFrozen Titanssquad.
sections.Strategy:
In the Frozen Titans, the intended synergy of this Mech'sJanus Cannonis to shatter theIce Mech's self-imposed freeze while attacking another enemy with the opposite shot. Though once a pilot with a shield is acquired (such asMafanorBethany Jones) and are piloting the Ice Mech, this strategy usually falls to the wayside.
A good early unlock is the Janus Cannon's first+1 Damageupgrade; for just 1 Reactor Core, this is good value for a damage increase on an attack that can hit 2 targets. Upgrading its movement is also helpful so that it can position itself without buildings or other ally units in its firing lines.
Since the Janus Cannon is forced to shoot in the opposite direction as the one chosen, it is preferrable to deploy the Mirror Mech in a tile with an open column or row, that have no buildings or objectives. This is particularly important if there are any webbing enemies, as otherwise getting the Mirror Mech webbed could force a situation where firing at them would also damage the grid. The pilotsGanaandLily Reedcan be particularly useful in the Mirror Mech for this reason, as their ability allows the mech to either be deployed in enemy territory instantly or get into position in turn 1 respectively.
